words.exampleArabic: كَتَبَ الطَّالِبُ أُطْرُوحَتَهُ عَنْ تَارِيخِ الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Student je napisao svoju tezu o historiji arapske književnosti.
words.exampleEn: The student wrote his thesis on the history of Arabic literature.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُونَ الْمُلَخَّصُ وَاضِحًا وَمُوجَزًا.
words.exampleBs: Sažetak mora biti jasan i koncizan.
words.exampleEn: The abstract must be clear and concise.

words.exampleArabic: أَضَافَ الْبَاحِثُ قَائِمَةَ الْمَصَادِرِ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْبَحْثِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač je dodao bibliografiju na kraju rada.
words.exampleEn: The researcher added the bibliography at the end of the paper.

words.exampleArabic: شَرَحَ الْمُؤَلِّفُ الْمُصْطَلَحَ فِي الْحَاشِيَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Autor je objasnio termin u fusnoti.
words.exampleEn: The author explained the term in the footnote.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ الْإِشَارَةُ إِلَى مَصْدَرِ كُلِّ اقْتِبَاسٍ فِي الْبَحْثِ.
words.exampleBs: Potrebno je navesti izvor svakog citata u radu.
words.exampleEn: Every citation in the paper must reference its source.

words.exampleArabic: قَدَّمَ الطَّالِبُ حُجَجًا قَوِيَّةً لِدَعْمِ مَوْقِفِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Student je iznio snažne argumente u prilog svog stava.
words.exampleEn: The student presented strong arguments to support his position.

words.exampleArabic: وَصَفَ الْبَاحِثُ الْمَنْهَجِيَّةَ الْمُتَّبَعَةَ فِي دِرَاسَتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač je opisao metodologiju korištenu u svojoj studiji.
words.exampleEn: The researcher described the methodology used in his study.

words.exampleArabic: تَضُمُّ الْجَامِعَةُ عِدَّةَ كُلِّيَّاتٍ مُتَخَصِّصَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Univerzitet ima nekoliko specijaliziranih fakulteta.
words.exampleEn: The university has several specialized faculties.

words.exampleArabic: عَقَدَ الْعَمِيدُ اجْتِمَاعًا مَعَ أَعْضَاءِ هَيْئَةِ التَّدْرِيسِ.
words.exampleBs: Dekan je održao sastanak s nastavnim osobljem.
words.exampleEn: The dean held a meeting with the teaching staff.

words.exampleArabic: يَبْدَأُ الْفَصْلُ الدِّرَاسِيُّ الثَّانِي فِي شَهْرِ فِبْرَايِرَ.
words.exampleBs: Drugi semestar počinje u februaru.
words.exampleEn: The second semester begins in February.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَتِ الرُّسُومُ الدِّرَاسِيَّةُ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الْجَامِعَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Školarina je porasla na mnogim univerzitetima.
words.exampleEn: Tuition fees have risen at many universities.

words.exampleArabic: يَقَعُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ فِي وَسَطِ الْحَرَمِ الْجَامِعِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Biblioteka se nalazi u centru kampusa.
words.exampleEn: The library is located at the center of the campus.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْكُنُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ فِي السَّكَنِ الْجَامِعِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi studenti žive u studentskom domu.
words.exampleEn: Many students live in the dormitory.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَ عَلَى مِنْحَةٍ دِرَاسِيَّةٍ لِإِكْمَالِ دِرَاسَتِهِ فِي الْخَارِجِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio je stipendiju za nastavak studija u inozemstvu.
words.exampleEn: He received a scholarship to continue his studies abroad.

words.exampleArabic: فَازَتْ بِزَمَالَةٍ بَحْثِيَّةٍ مَرْمُوقَةٍ فِي مَجَالِ الْعُلُومِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobila je uglednu istraživačku fellowship u oblasti nauke.
words.exampleEn: She won a prestigious research fellowship in the field of science.

words.exampleArabic: أَلْقَى الْأُسْتَاذُ مُحَاضَرَةً مُمْتِعَةً حَوْلَ اللِّسَانِيَّاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Profesor je održao zanimljivo predavanje o lingvistici.
words.exampleEn: The professor gave an engaging lecture on linguistics.

words.exampleArabic: شَارَكَ الْبَاحِثُونَ فِي نَدْوَةٍ دَوْلِيَّةٍ حَوْلَ التَّغَيُّرِ الْمَنَاخِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživači su učestvovali u međunarodnom seminaru o klimatskim promjenama.
words.exampleEn: The researchers participated in an international seminar on climate change.

words.exampleArabic: نَظَّمَتِ الْجَامِعَةُ وَرْشَةَ عَمَلٍ حَوْلَ مَهَارَاتِ الْكِتَابَةِ الْأَكَادِيمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Univerzitet je organizirao radionicu o vještinama akademskog pisanja.
words.exampleEn: The university organized a workshop on academic writing skills.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ بَعْضُ الطُّلَّابِ إِلَى دُرُوسٍ خُصُوصِيَّةٍ إِضَافِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Neki studenti trebaju dodatne privatne instrukcije.
words.exampleEn: Some students need additional private tutorials.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَشَرَ التَّعَلُّمُ عَنْ بُعْدٍ بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ فِي السَّنَوَاتِ الْأَخِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Učenje na daljinu se znatno proširilo u posljednjih nekoliko godina.
words.exampleEn: Distance learning has expanded significantly in recent years.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَفَّرُ الْمَنَصَّاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ فُرَصًا وَاسِعَةً لِلتَّعَلُّمِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Digitalne platforme pružaju široke mogućnosti za e-učenje.
words.exampleEn: Digital platforms offer wide opportunities for e-learning.

words.exampleArabic: تَدْرُسُ اللِّسَانِيَّاتُ بِنْيَةَ اللُّغَاتِ وَتَطَوُّرَهَا.
words.exampleBs: Lingvistika proučava strukturu i razvoj jezika.
words.exampleEn: Linguistics studies the structure and development of languages.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الْفَلْسَفَةُ إِلَى الْإِجَابَةِ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ الْكُبْرَى لِلْوُجُودِ.
words.exampleBs: Filozofija nastoji odgovoriti na velika egzistencijalna pitanja.
words.exampleEn: Philosophy seeks to answer the great questions of existence.

words.exampleArabic: يَدْرُسُ عِلْمُ الِاجْتِمَاعِ الظَّوَاهِرَ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةَ وَتَأْثِيرَهَا عَلَى الْأَفْرَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Sociologija proučava društvene pojave i njihov utjecaj na pojedince.
words.exampleEn: Sociology studies social phenomena and their impact on individuals.

words.exampleArabic: يَدْرُسُ طُلَّابُ الِاقْتِصَادِ آلِيَّاتِ السُّوقِ وَالتَّنْمِيَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Studenti ekonomije proučavaju tržišne mehanizme i razvoj.
words.exampleEn: Economics students study market mechanisms and development.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ الْهَنْدَسَةُ مِنْ أَكْثَرِ التَّخَصُّصَاتِ طَلَبًا فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Inženjerstvo je jedan od najtraženih smjerova na tržištu rada.
words.exampleEn: Engineering is one of the most sought-after specializations in the job market.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ الِالْتِحَاقُ بِكُلِّيَّةِ الطِّبِّ تَحْصِيلًا أَكَادِيمِيًّا مُمَيَّزًا.
words.exampleBs: Upis na medicinski fakultet zahtijeva izvanredan akademski uspjeh.
words.exampleEn: Admission to medical school requires outstanding academic achievement.

words.exampleArabic: اجْتَهَدَ الطُّلَّابُ فِي الْمُذَاكَرَةِ اسْتِعْدَادًا لِلِامْتِحَانِ النِّهَائِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Studenti su marljivo učili u pripremi za završni ispit.
words.exampleEn: The students studied hard in preparation for the final exam.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَ عَلَى أَعْلَى دَرَجَةٍ فِي مَادَّةِ الرِّيَاضِيَّاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobio je najvišu ocjenu iz matematike.
words.exampleEn: He received the highest grade in mathematics.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ الْمُعَدَّلُ التَّرَاكُمِيُّ عَلَى فُرَصِ الِالْتِحَاقِ بِبَرَامِجِ الدِّرَاسَاتِ الْعُلْيَا.
words.exampleBs: Prosjek ocjena utječe na mogućnosti upisa na postdiplomske studije.
words.exampleEn: The GPA affects chances of admission to postgraduate programs.

words.exampleArabic: نَجَحَ الطَّالِبُ فِي مُنَاقَشَةِ رِسَالَتِهِ أَمَامَ لَجْنَةِ الْحُكَّامِ.
words.exampleBs: Student je uspješno odbranio svoju tezu pred komisijom.
words.exampleEn: The student successfully defended his thesis before the committee.

words.exampleArabic: يَشْمَلُ التَّقْيِيمُ النِّهَائِيُّ الِامْتِحَانَ وَالْأَعْمَالَ التَّطْبِيقِيَّةَ.
words.exampleBs: Završna evaluacija uključuje ispit i praktične radove.
words.exampleEn: The final evaluation includes the exam and practical assignments.

words.exampleArabic: تَخْضَعُ الْأَبْحَاثُ الْعِلْمِيَّةُ لِلْمُرَاجَعَةِ الْأَكَادِيمِيَّةِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Naučni radovi prolaze kroz stručnu recenziju prije objavljivanja.
words.exampleEn: Scientific papers undergo peer review before publication.

words.exampleArabic: صَاغَ الْبَاحِثُ فَرْضِيَّةً وَاضِحَةً قَبْلَ بَدْءِ التَّجْرِبَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač je formulisao jasnu hipotezu prije početka eksperimenta.
words.exampleEn: The researcher formulated a clear hypothesis before starting the experiment.

words.exampleArabic: جَمَعَ الْفَرِيقُ الْبَيَانَاتِ مِنْ مَصَادِرَ مُتَعَدِّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Tim je prikupio podatke iz više izvora.
words.exampleEn: The team collected data from multiple sources.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَى الْبَاحِثُ تَحْلِيلًا دَقِيقًا لِلنَّتَائِجِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač je proveo preciznu analizu rezultata.
words.exampleEn: The researcher conducted a precise analysis of the results.

words.exampleArabic: خَلَصَ الْبَاحِثُ إِلَى اسْتِنْتَاجَاتٍ مُهِمَّةٍ مِنْ بِيَانَاتِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač je došao do važnih zaključaka iz svojih podataka.
words.exampleEn: The researcher drew important conclusions from his data.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَى الطُّلَّابُ تَجَارِبَ عَمَلِيَّةً فِي مُخْتَبَرِ الْكِيمِيَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Studenti su proveli praktične eksperimente u hemijskoj laboratoriji.
words.exampleEn: The students conducted practical experiments in the chemistry lab.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَى الطَّاقِمُ الْبَحْثِيُّ اسْتِطْلَاعًا شَمِلَ أَلْفَ شَخْصٍ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživački tim je proveo anketu koja je obuhvatila hiljadu osoba.
words.exampleEn: The research team conducted a survey covering a thousand people.

words.exampleArabic: اسْتَغْرَقَتِ الرِّسَالَةُ الْجَامِعِيَّةُ ثَلَاثَ سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ الْبَحْثِ.
words.exampleBs: Magistarski rad je zahtijevao tri godine istraživanja.
words.exampleEn: The university dissertation took three years of research.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَدِّمُ الْأُسْتَاذُ الْإِشْرَافَ اللَّازِمَ لِطُلَّابِ الدِّرَاسَاتِ الْعُلْيَا.
words.exampleBs: Profesor pruža potrebno mentorstvo studentima postdiplomskog studija.
words.exampleEn: The professor provides the necessary supervision for postgraduate students.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ النَّشْرُ الْعِلْمِيُّ مَعْيَارًا رَئِيسِيًّا لِتَقَدُّمِ أَعْضَاءِ هَيْئَةِ التَّدْرِيسِ.
words.exampleBs: Naučna publikacija smatra se ključnim kriterijem napredovanja nastavnog osoblja.
words.exampleEn: Academic publication is considered a key criterion for faculty advancement.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَتِ الْجَامِعَةُ عَلَى الِاعْتِمَادِ الْأَكَادِيمِيِّ الدَّوْلِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Univerzitet je dobio međunarodnu akademsku akreditaciju.
words.exampleEn: The university obtained international academic accreditation.

words.exampleArabic: اخْتَارَ الطَّالِبُ تَخَصُّصَ الْأَدَبِ الْمُقَارَنِ.
words.exampleBs: Student je odabrao specijalizaciju iz komparativne književnosti.
words.exampleEn: The student chose comparative literature as his specialization.

words.exampleArabic: تَطْلُبُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ الْعُلْيَا مُسْتَوًى عَالِيًا مِنَ الِاسْتِقْلَالِيَّةِ الْبَحْثِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Postdiplomski studij zahtijeva visok nivo istraživačke samostalnosti.
words.exampleEn: Postgraduate studies require a high level of research independence.

words.exampleArabic: تَضُمُّ هَيْئَةُ التَّدْرِيسِ نُخْبَةً مِنَ الْأَكَادِيمِيِّينَ الْمُتَمَيِّزِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Nastavno osoblje uključuje elitne akademičare.
words.exampleEn: The teaching staff comprises a selection of distinguished academics.

words.exampleArabic: تُرَاجِعُ الْجَامِعَةُ الْمُنَاهِجَ الدِّرَاسِيَّةَ كُلَّ أَرْبَعِ سَنَوَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Univerzitet revidira nastavni plan i program svakih četiri godine.
words.exampleEn: The university reviews the curriculum every four years.

words.exampleArabic: تَمْتَلِكُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ مِئَاتِ الْآلَافِ مِنَ الْكُتُبِ وَالْمَجَلَّاتِ الْعِلْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Biblioteka posjeduje stotine hiljada knjiga i naučnih časopisa.
words.exampleEn: The library holds hundreds of thousands of books and scientific journals.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْكِسُ الْإِنْجَازُ الْأَكَادِيمِيُّ مَدَى جَدِّيَّةِ الطَّالِبِ فِي تَحْصِيلِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Akademski uspjeh odražava ozbiljnost studenta u učenju.
words.exampleEn: Academic achievement reflects how seriously a student approaches their studies.

words.exampleArabic: اعْتَمَدَتِ الدِّرَاسَةُ عَلَى أُطُرٍ مَرْجِعِيَّةٍ مُتَعَدِّدَةٍ مِنَ الْأَدَبِ الْعِلْمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Studija se oslonila na više referentnih okvira iz naučne literature.
words.exampleEn: The study relied on multiple theoretical frameworks from the scientific literature.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَاعِدُ النَّقْدُ الْأَكَادِيمِيُّ الْبَاحِثِينَ عَلَى تَطْوِيرِ أَعْمَالِهِمْ.
words.exampleBs: Akademska kritika pomaže istraživačima da unaprijede svoje radove.
words.exampleEn: Academic critique helps researchers improve their work.

words.exampleArabic: قَدَّمَتِ الطَّالِبَةُ أُطْرُوحَةً مُضَادَّةً لِدَحْضِ الرَّأْيِ السَّائِدِ.
words.exampleBs: Studentica je iznijela kontraargument kako bi pobila prevladavajuće mišljenje.
words.exampleEn: The student presented a counter-argument to refute the prevailing view.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ الِاسْتِدْلَالُ الْعِلْمِيُّ عَلَى الْأَدِلَّةِ الْمَوْضُوعِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Naučno zaključivanje oslanja se na objektivne dokaze.
words.exampleEn: Scientific reasoning relies on objective evidence.

words.exampleArabic: تَخْتَلِفُ الطَّاقَةُ الِاسْتِيعَابِيَّةُ مِنْ طَالِبٍ إِلَى آخَرَ.
words.exampleBs: Sposobnost razumijevanja razlikuje se od studenta do studenta.
words.exampleEn: Comprehension ability differs from one student to another.

words.exampleArabic: يُشَجِّعُ الْأُسْتَاذُ طُلَّابَهُ عَلَى التَّفْكِيرِ النَّقْدِيِّ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْحِفْظِ.
words.exampleBs: Profesor podstiče studente na kritičko mišljenje umjesto na memorisanje.
words.exampleEn: The professor encourages his students to think critically rather than memorize.
